info.title: Ultimaker - Connect API
info.description: This API exposes endpoints to interact with the Ultimaker Digital Factory software

tags.name: debug
tags.description: Endpoint for interaction with the print job queue

tags.name: print_jobs
tags.description: Endpoint for interaction with the print job queue or with specific jobs in it.

tags.name: printers
tags.description: Endpoint for interaction with the printers

tags.name: cloud
tags.description: Endpoint for part of the Cloud/OAuth2 authentication process

tags.name: materials
tags.description: Endpoint for interaction with the materials

origin.description: The origin of the match result

debug_message.description: Message string of the match result

uuid.description: The Unique identifier of the print job.

name.description: The human readable name of this job. By default, the name of the provided file is used with all (known) suffixes are stripped

created_at.description: The moment this print job was created on this cluster

started.description: Whether the job has been started

status.description: The status of the print job

printer_uuid.description: Printer uuid associated to this job

machine_variant.description: Target machine variant for the job

time_elapsed.description: Current elapsed print time in seconds.

time_total.description: Current estimated total print time in seconds.

last_seen.description: Seconds since the print job was last checked

network_error_count.description: Number of failed connection attempts to check the job status

force.description: A boolean indicating whether the job ignore matching criteria such as material type, this only works in combination with a constraint to a specific printer

assigned_to.description: Printer uuid of printer reserved for this job

owner.description: Name of the person who submitted the job

build_plate.description: The build plate (type) this job needs to be printed on.

configuration_changes_required.description: List of configuration changes the printer this job is associated with needs to make in order to be able to print this job

impediments_to_printing.description: A list of reasons that prevent this job from being printed on the associated printer

items.description: Family names of machines suitable for this print job

printed_on_uuid.description: UUID of the printer used to print this job.

deleted_at.description: The time when this print job was deleted.

cloud_job_id.description: Cloud job ID if job originates from the Ultimaker cloud.

density.description: The density of the material in gram per cubic cm

require_printer_name.description: Force this job to be printed on a specific printer by its unique host name.

type.description: The build plate type currently loaded in this printer.

index.description: The hotend slot or extruder index to change

target_id.description: Target material guid or hotend id

origin_id.description: Original/current material guid or hotend id

target_name.description: Target material name or hotend id

origin_name.description: Original/current material name or hotend id

translation_key.description: A string indicating A reason the print cannot be printed, such as 'does_not_fit_in_build_volume'

severity.description: A number indicating the severity of the problem, with higher being more severe

force.description: A boolean indicating whether the job ignore matching criteria such as material type, this only works in combination with a constraint to a specific printer

to_position.description: Set position of print job; only position 0 is supported

list.description: The name of the print job list to operate on. Defaults to 'queued'.

action.description: What action should be performed on the status of the print job?

quantity.description: How often should the job be duplicated
In the case of the duplicate command, the number of duplicates needed.

action.description: Not all actions can be done at every state. The following states should be taken into account- abort is always allowed.- print is only allowed when the print is paused.- pause is only allowed when the print is active- reprint is only allowed when the print is completed.- duplicate is only allowed when the print is not printing (e.g. not assigned to a printer)

created_at.description: The creation time of the print job

deleted_at.description: The deletion time of the print job

status.description: The last status of the print job

job_material_1_guid.description: Material 1 GUID as required by the print job gcode

job_printcore_1.description: PrintCore  as required by the print job gcode

time_total.description: Final elapsed print time in seconds.

compatible_machine_families.description: Comma separated list of all machine families that can print this job

require_printer_name.description: Host name of the printer this printer is restricted to (if any)

cloud_job_id.description: The print job assigned by the Ultimaker Cloud

ip_address.description: The printer's last known IP address

is_host.description: Indicates if this printer is the group host or not

enabled.description: Whether or not the printer may receive print jobs

reserved_by.description: If this printer is reserved by a print job, then this field holds the job's UUID

maintenance_required.description: Does the printer require any form of maintenance

latest_available_firmware.description: Version of the latest available firmware

supported.description: Set to true if this printer model supports the installation of the Air Manager
Set to true if this printer model supports the installation of the Material Station

slot_index.description: Slot index. First slot is number 0.

extruder_index.description: Extruder index. First extruder is number 0.

print_core_id.description: Print Core ID if the slot is loaded with a material.

material_empty.description: True if no more filament is available

material_remaining.description: Amount of material left of the spool. Ranges from 0 meaning empty to 1 meaning full. -1 indicates missing data.

compatible.description: Set to true if this material and print core combination is compatible.

severity.description: These log levels are described in https://confluence.ultimaker.com/display/SD/20180903-2+Logging

timestamp.description: The date and time when this warning was created in ISO 8601.

message.description: Human readable description of the warning. This is intended for developer eyes.

uuid.description: UUID to identify this warning instance.

code.description: A short "error code" which identifies this kind of warning.

enabled.description: Whether or not to allow print jobs to be sent to the printer

action.description: Should a firmware update be started / stopped?

oauth_login_url.description: The base OAuth URL to use for user logins

oauth_login_url_disconnect.description: The base OAuth URL to use for user logins during the disconnect flow.

associated_account_name.description: The name of the Cloud account used when associating Ultimaker Connect with the cloud

mode.description: The cloud connection flow style this host printer supports.

payload.description: Type depends on the identifier being passed in.

mode.description: The authentication mode being used by the whole system.

valid.description: True if the current user is valid/authenticated

account_management_url.description: URL to manage the user's account

ParseError.description: When a mask can't be parsed

MaskError.description: When any error occurs on mask
